sp: 3.1.1 State how humans reproduce.
3.1.2 Describe changes in size, height and weight in an individual since birth.
3.1.3 Make generalization that growths among individuals are different by carrying out activities.
3.1.4 Describe that offsprings inherit features from their parents or ancestors.
3.1.5 Give examples of features that are inherited by the offsprings from their parents or ancestors such as skin colour, iris colour and hair type.
objektif: Pada akhir PdP, murid dapat State how humans reproduce. dengan betul.
Pada akhir PdP, murid dapat State how humans reproduce. dengan bimbingan guru.

sp: 4.1.1 State how animals reproduce.
4.1.2 Classify animals according to the way they reproduce.
4.1.3 Explain with examples animals that lay many eggs and animals that lay less egg.
4.1.4 Explain with examples animals that give birth to many young and animals that give birth to less young.
4.1.5 Record the changes in the animals’ growth by observing their life cycles.
4.1.6 Explain with examples young animals that look like their parents and animals which do not look like their parents
objektif: Pada akhir PdP, murid dapat State how animals reproduce. dengan betul.
Pada akhir PdP, murid dapat State how animals reproduce. dengan bimbingan guru.

sp: 7.1.1. Identify components in an electric circuit i.e. dry cell, bulb and switch.
7.1.2. Explain functions of the components in a complete electric circuit.
7.1.3. Build a complete electric circuit using dry cell, bulb, switch and connecting wires
7.1.4. Predict why bulb does not light up in a circuit.
7.1.5. Record whether a bulb will light up when the switch is replaced with other objects or materials by carrying out investigations.
7.1.6. Make a generalization objects that can light up a bulb in a circuit are conductors and objects that cannot light up a bulb are insulators.
objektif: Pada akhir PdP, murid dapat Identify components in an electric circuit i.e. dry cell, bulb and switch. dengan betul.
Pada akhir PdP, murid dapat Identify components in an electric circuit i.e. dry cell, bulb and switch. dengan bimbingan guru.

sp: 8.1.1. Describe methods to separate a mixture of various materials or objects.
8.1.2. Provide reasoning about the method used to separate a mixture of various materials or objects.
8.1.3. Identify materials that are dissolve and cannot dissolve in water by carrying out investigations.
8.1.4. Summarize how materials can be dissolved more quickly by carrying out investigations.

sp: 9.1.1. State natural sources of water such as rain, rivers, lakes, seas and springs.
9.1.2. State direction of water flow by carry out activities.
9.1.3. Make generalisation on natural direction of water flow such as in rivers and waterfalls through observation using various media.
9.1.4. Arrange in sequence the natural water cycle.
9.2.1. State that air is around us
9.2.2. State that air consists gases such as oxygen and carbon dioxide.
9.2.3. Describe that moving air is wind.
9.2.4. Generate ideas on the effects of air movement in everyday life.
9.2.5. Create a tool or model by applying knowledge that demonstrates usage of air movement.
objektif: Pada akhir PdP, murid dapat State natural sources of water such as rain, rivers, lakes, seas and springs. dengan betul.
Pada akhir PdP, murid dapat State natural sources of water such as rain, rivers, lakes, seas and springs. dengan bimbingan guru.
